name: X: Open Post
description: Open one X post URL in a fresh tab and return a compact snapshot plus (when possible) a GraphQL-resolved payload with full text, media URLs, and timestamps. Use for read-only inspection of one post. Do not use to fetch a whole conversation (`x_thread`) or timelines (`x_profile_posts`, `x_search_posts`, `x_home_timeline_digest`).

browser_automation.description: Opens the post URL in a fresh tab, waits for the primary article, and returns a DOM snapshot plus a GraphQL TweetResultByRestId payload when the page session allows it.

sequences.name: x_open_post
sequences.description: Open a post URL -> wait for the primary article -> return page and post metadata.

required_variables.name: post_url
required_variables.description: Full X post URL to open

steps.name: Open the target post in a fresh tab
Allow the post page to settle
Wait for the primary post article
steps.selector: main article[data-testid='tweet'], main article[role='article'], main article

steps.name: Read the opened post state

help.summary: Open one X post URL read-only and return a DOM + GraphQL snapshot.

examples.description: Fetch one post's author, text, timestamp, and media URLs.

help.returns: { url, title, author, text, posted_at, image_urls[], video_urls[], media_permalink_urls[], external_links[], inline_reply_present, like_state, like_label, media_resolved_via }.
notes: Read-only. Never posts, replies, or likes.
Opens a fresh tab so runs don't collide.
media_resolved_via is `TweetResultByRestId` when the GraphQL path succeeds, otherwise `dom` as a fallback.
